  • edu.bupt.ta.service中User的使用

    返回User的edu.bupt.ta.service中的方法
    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    User
    UserService.authenticate(String username, String password)
    Authenticates a user by username and password.
    User
    UserService.clearCvMetadata(String userId)
    Clears the CV metadata for a user, setting cvStatus to MISSING and all related columns to empty strings.
    User
    UserService.findById(String userId)
    Looks up a user by their unique ID (e.g.
    User
    UserService.findByUsername(String username)
    Looks up a user by username.
    User
    UserService.registerTa(String username, String password, String name, String email, int year, String major, String skills, String availability, String personalStatement, String relevantCourses, String projectExperience, String preferredRole)
    Registers a new TA account.
    User
    UserService.updateCvMetadata(String userId, String storedName, String originalName, String contentType, String uploadedAt)
    Updates the five CV-related columns in a user's record after a successful file upload.
    User
    UserService.updateProfile(String userId, String name, String email, int year, String major, String skills, String availability, String personalStatement, String relevantCourses, String projectExperience, String preferredRole)
    Updates the editable profile fields for an existing user.
    返回变量类型为User的类型的edu.bupt.ta.service中的方法
    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    List<User>
    UserService.getAllTaUsers()
    Returns all users whose role is TA.
    List<User>
    UserService.getAllUsers()
    Returns all users, with summaryStatus and cvStatus recalculated for each.
    参数类型为User的edu.bupt.ta.service中的方法
    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    String
    UserService.calculateSummaryStatus(User user)
    Calculates the completeness of a TA's profile.
    String
    DashboardService.getBestMatchMessage(User user)
    Returns a personalised message describing the highest-scoring job for the user.
    int
    DashboardService.getMatchedJobs(User user)
    Counts how many open jobs have a matchScore of 60 or higher for the given user.
    List<Job>
    JobService.getOpenJobsForUser(User user)
    Returns all OPEN jobs with a matchScore for the given TA user, sorted by score descending.
    int
    DashboardService.getPendingCount(User user)
    Returns the number of active (PENDING or INTERVIEW) applications for the user.
    int
    DashboardService.getTodoCount(User user)
     
    boolean
    UserService.hasUploadedCv(User user)
    Checks whether the user has a CV file uploaded.
    boolean
    UserService.isApplicationReady(User user)
    Determines whether a user is eligible to apply for jobs.
    void
    UserService.registerUser(User user)
    Saves an externally-constructed User to the CSV.
    类型变量类型为User的edu.bupt.ta.service中的方法参数
    修饰符和类型
    方法
    说明
    void
    AdminService.saveUsersDirect(List<User> users)
    Directly persists a user list to CSV, bypassing individual field updates.
    void
    UserService.saveUsersDirect(List<User> users)
    Directly persists a list of users to CSV, replacing all existing records.
